zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden於1426年2月1日出生在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 歐登伯格歐登伯格時，他的父親Dietrich Count of Oldenburg36歲，母親Countess Helvig of Schauenburg31歲。他於1449年10月28日與Dorothea von Brandenburg在丹麥奧本哈福結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1481年5月21日在丹麥奧本哈福哥本哈根享年55歲，埋葬在丹麥洛斯吉爾德洛斯吉爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden于1426年2月1日出生在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 歐登伯格歐登伯格时，他的父亲Dietrich Count of Oldenburg36岁，母亲Countess Helvig of Schauenburg31岁。他于1449年10月28日与Dorothea von Brandenburg在丹麦奧本哈福结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1481年5月21日在丹麦奧本哈福哥本哈根享年55岁，埋葬在丹麦洛斯吉爾德洛斯吉爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Denmark,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Norfolk): ethnic name denoting someone from Denmark (see   Dence  ). In the British Isles this name is found mainly in East Anglia.
Americanized form of German Dennemark, ethnic name for someone from Denmark, from Middle Low German Dennemarken.

variants.name: Dence
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Herta.

English (Kent): variant of Dench, an ethnic name for someone from Denmark, from Middle English denshe, dench ‘Danish’ (Old English denisc). There were many Danes in England in the Middle Ages, not only the long-established settlers in the Danelaw region, but also more recent immigrants.

nameMeanings.name: Norway,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of   Northway  .
habitational name from the country of Norway. Compare   Norrie  .
English:

variants.name: Northway
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places called with Middle English bi northe weie ‘(place) to the north of the way or road’, including Northway in Monkleigh, Widecombe in the Moor, and Parkham, Norway in Whitestone, Narraway in Drewsteignton (all Devon), and Northway in Halse (Somerset).

variants.name: Norrie
meanings: Scottish (Angus and Aberdeenshire): habitational name from the country of Norway (reflecting the Scandinavian form Norge). Compare Norway .

nameMeanings.name: and
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Jasvir, Dalbir, Jagdish.  German Alois, Ewald, Gerda.
Indian (Punjab): Sikh name, probably from Punjabi məṇḍ ‘skill’. It is based on the name of a Jat clan.
German: variant of   Mandt  .

variants.name: Mandt
meanings: German and Norwegian (of Danish origin): from a short form of the ancient Germanic personal names beginning with Mant-, e.g. Mantwic, formed with Old High German mandjan ‘rejoice’ as the first element.

variants.name: Mander
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Balwinder, Bikram.
English: occupational name from Middle English mander, maunder ‘basket-maker’, a derivative of Middle English mande, maunde ‘basket’. Compare Mand .
German: habitational name from any of the places called Mandern, in Hesse and the Rhineland.

nameMeanings.name: Sweden
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch (Van Sweeden): variant of Van Zweeden, a habitational name for someone from Sweden.
Probably also an altered form of Norwegian   Sween   or possibly Irish   Sweeten  , or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Sween
meanings: Irish and Scottish: shortened form of   McSween  .
Norwegian: variant of   Sveen  .

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

nameMeanings.name: King
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the vocabulary word for a male monarch, bestowed, especially in America, with a hint of the notion that the bearer would have kingly qualities;  compare  Duke   and   Earl .  In some cases it may be a transferred use of the surname (originally a nickname or an occupational name given to someone who was employed in a royal household). Its frequency among African Americans is no doubt partly attributable to the civil rights leader  Martin Luther King  (  1929–68 ). It is also used as a short form of   Kingsley .

variants.name: Kingsley
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally a local name derived from various places (in Cheshire, Hampshire, Staffordshire) named in Old English as Cyningeslēah ‘king's wood’.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

historicEvents.description: Copenhagen is declared the capital city.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden was born on 1 February 1426, in Oldenburg, Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany, his father, Dietrich Count of Oldenburg, was 36 and his mother, Countess Helvig of Schauenburg, was 31. He married Dorothea von Brandenburg on 28 October 1449, in København, Denmark. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 21 May 1481, in Copenhagen, København, Denmark, at the age of 55, and was buried in Roskilde, Roskilde, Denmark.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden est né le 1 février 1426, à Oldenburg, Kreis Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne, son père, Dietrich Count of Oldenburg, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Countess Helvig of Schauenburg, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Dorothea von Brandenburg le 28 octobre 1449, à København, Danemark. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 21 mai 1481, à Copenhague, København, Danemark, à l’âge de 55 ans, et a été enterré à Roskilde, Roskilde, Danemark.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden am 1. Februar 1426 in Oldenburg, Kreis Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dietrich Count of Oldenburg 36 und seine Mutter Countess Helvig of Schauenburg 31. Er hat am 28. Oktober 1449 in København, Dänemark Dorothea von Brandenburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Mai 1481 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Kopenhagen, København, Dänemark und wurde in Roskilde, Roskilde, Dänemark begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden è nato il il 1 febbraio 1426 nel Oldenburg, Kreis Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germania, il suo padre, Dietrich Count of Oldenburg, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Countess Helvig of Schauenburg, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Dorothea von Brandenburg il 28 ottobre 1449, nel København, Danimarca. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 21 maggio 1481, nel København, København, Danimarca, all'età di 55 anni, e fu sepolto a Roskilde, Roskilde, Danimarca.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Swedenが1426年2月1日にドイツスチレスウィグ-hオルステインクレイス オルデンブルグオルデンブルグで生まれた時，父Dietrich Count of Oldenburgは36歳，母Countess Helvig of Schauenburgは31歳であった。1449年10月28日にデンマーククoベンハヴンでDorothea von Brandenburgと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1481年5月21日にデンマーククoベンハヴンクoベンハヴンで55歳で死去し，デンマークロスキルドロスキルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden(이)가 1426년 2월 1일 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 덴버그 덴버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dietrich Count of Oldenburg(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Countess Helvig of Schauenburg(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1449년 10월 28일 덴마크 ko벤하브에서 Dorothea von Brandenburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1481년 5월 21일 덴마크 ko벤하브 코펜하겐에서 55세의 나이로 사망했으며 덴마크 로스킬드 로스킬드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden nasceu em 1 de fevereiro de 1426, em Oldenburg, Kreis Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha, seu pai, Dietrich Count of Oldenburg, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Countess Helvig of Schauenburg, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothea von Brandenburg em 28 de outubro de 1449, em København, Dinamarca. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de maio de 1481, em København, København, Dinamarca, com 55 anos, e foi sepultado em Roskilde, Roskilde, Dinamarca.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden родился 1 февраля 1426 г. в местности олденбург, крис олденбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия, его отцу по имени Dietrich Count of Oldenburg было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Helvig of Schauenburg, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothea von Brandenburg 28 октября 1449 г. в местности кoбенавн, Дания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 21 мая 1481 г. в местности Копенгаген, кoбенавн, Дания в возрасте 55 лет и был похоронен в местности роскаилд, роскаилд, Дания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian I King of Denmark, Norway, and Sweden nació el 1 de febrero de 1426, en Oldenburg, Kreis Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania, su papá, Dietrich Count of Oldenburg, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Countess Helvig of Schauenburg, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Dorothea von Brandenburg el 28 de octubre de 1449, en København, Dinamarca. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 21 de mayo de 1481, en København, København, Dinamarca, a la edad de 55 años, y fue sepultado en Roskilde, Roskilde, Dinamarca.
